hooks.command: echo 'This user follows the motif development workflow. When they describe a development task, remind them they can use /motif:dev <task> to run the full 5-stage workflow (Research, Plan, Scaffold, Build, Validate) or work through stages manually. The user prefers: (1) research before coding, (2) explicit plans with tradeoff analysis, (3) structured task tracking, (4) validation against the original goal. Respect pause points — never auto-advance through workflow stages without approval.'
